titleStmt.title: SII 39.103: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 103. (A.R. No. 103 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL (INSIDE) OF THE TEMPLE KITCHEN ON THE SAME HILL [MĀṞA]VARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVANACHA[KRAVARTIN SUNDARA PĀṆḌYADĒVĀ]-[1]5TH YEAR, [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription records the lease of temple land as Kārāṇ-kiḻamaiuḻavukāṉi, which was lying waste to a certain Karikālachōḻa-pēraiyaṉ with permission to cultivate and resettle with kuḍi under the name of Tiyagasiriya Perumānllūr. Mentions the coin Pudukkuḷigai. Ellāndalaiyānapāṇḍya-brahmādarāyaṉ figured as a signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī maṟkīttikku mel śrī komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ ṭiya tevarkku 15 tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum veḷḷikki
ḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aniḻattu nāḷ puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī ruttira śrī māheśvararum tāṉ to
mum tivantaṇikkuṭi nāṭṭu pacilayāṉa tāṉa pū nallūr tiyāka riyapperumāṉ Ammattevaṉāṉa kāṅkeya kārāṇ kiḻamai Uḻavukāṇi piṭipāṭupaṇ
ṇikuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭikkāṭṭu puravil karikāla coḻa peraiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭu pāḻaye kuḷamum Uṭaipāḻpaṭ
ṭu vayalum vati Aḻintu parumākkāṭiḻantu ceṅkalpaṭṭu kiṭakkaiyil Ikkarikāla coḻa peraiyaṉ Ipperunāṉ kellaik kuṭpaṭṭa puravum kuḷamum nañce
puṉceyum nattamumn toṭṭamu kuḷamum kuḷappaṟippum kīḻ nokkiṉa kiṇaṟum mel nokkiya maramum maṟṟum Ippuraviluḷḷa samastaprāptikaḷu Ippuravum �
Inta vaṭamelai pāricattil mutti kuṭikāṭṭil kuḷamum kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa puṟavum nañcey puṉceyum nattamum toṭṭamum ki
ḻ nokkiya kiṇaṟum melnokkiya maramum maṟṟum Ippuṟa vāluḷḷa samasta prāptikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ palakaṇiyāka paṟṟi Ikkuḷam Iraṇṭum Oru kuḷappaṭutti Oṉṟākave
ti kuḷamum vayalum kāṭum veṭṭi
mum vata Iṭṭi koppeṟṟi Ippaṭiyāka kkoṇṭu kārāṇkiḻamai Uḻavu kāṇiyāka paṟṟi Aṉupavippārākavum tiyākañciṟiya peru
māḷ nallūr nikkiḻamai mutalāka Ivariṭṭa kuḷaveṭṭavum kiṇaṟu veṭṭavum paṇitta kaḷukkum Iṭṭu cilavāka putukkuḷikai ø4 100 Ippaṇam nā
lnūṟum kāṇikiḻamai mutalāka paṟṟi Itiyākaṉ ciṟiya perumāḷ nallūril namakku veṇṭum kuṭiyum Aṉaittu Ūruṅ kuṭiyumākki cantirātittavar kārāṇki
ḻamaiyākap paṟṟi Aṉupavippārākavum Ippaṭi Aṉupavikkumiṭattu Ippuṟavukku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu
Icainta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa puravunilamum kārāṇ
kiḻamaiyākap paṟṟi Aṉupavippārākavum Aṉupavikkumiṭattu Iṉnāyaṉārkku kaṭamai koḷḷa niccitta paṭiyāvatu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kol 24 Aṭik ko
lāl Irunūṟṟu ttāru kuḻi nilam Irumāvāka Aḷantu Iṭṭa puṟavunilattukkup pacāṉa ka mai māttāl rāci ø4 ḷadha 100m Āṭikkuruvai māttāl
tāl Irāci ø pon_ 4 100m payirc ceyyum nilattukku māttāl Irāci ø pon_ puṉcey payirceyta nilattukku māttāl
Em 2 100m Āka ppaṭpokan torum payir pārttuk kaṭamaikaṭṭi taravu cātaṉam koṇṭu calavaṟuppārākavum Ippaṭi calavaṟukku maḷavil kuḷamum ti
runtu maḷavum vāṭṭai nāru kaṭamai kāṭṭiṉa mutalil nāliloṉṟu tantu mūvāṇṭiluṅ kaḻittāl piṉpu muḻukkaṭamaiyāka kaikkoḷvomākavum Iṉ nāyaṉār
vaṭakkil tiruttil teṉciṟakil naṭuvil nārācattukku mēṟkum Amarāpati kāttār maṉaikku kiḻakkum Uḷḷa muḻattāluḷḷa ciṉṉam Ittāluḷḷa puḻakkaṭai
vā niḷamum ka yāka paṟṟi Eṭuttuk koṇṭu Ivaṉaiyum Ikkāṇiyum cantirātittavar cellak kaḻapai kāṇiyāka paṟṟi Ivaruppi paṭikku
m Iruttup potuvārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittuk kāṇikaḻapai Uḻavukāṇi piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttom tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil
śrī rudra śrī māheśvararum tāṉattomum Ippaṭikku Ellān talaiyāṉa pāṇṭiya piramātarāyaṉ tiru Otta cāmam pucippāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
